name: Esports Marketing
description: Public marketing landing surface for an esports team operations platform with image-overlay hero, feature grid, testimonials, and final call to action.

page_briefs.home: Marketing landing page for an esports team operations platform. Image-overlay hero anchors the top with a full-bleed action shot of a team on stage, a bold headline about running a pro team like a pro org, and dual CTAs for trial and demo. Below, a features grid highlights roster management, scrim scheduling, VOD review, and sponsor tracking. Next, a testimonials band carries quotes from coaches, managers, and org owners. The page closes with a full-width cta-section driving visitors to book a demo.
